dispatch_reason: Authored Pack pack/verify work is deterministic repo-local implementation, not a remote runtime lane.
action: Run the release contract and close the smallest assemble, verify, inspect, or public-surface gap without adding attestation, proof, secrecy, or RNG claims.
why: This lets bounded human-to-agent handoff packets compound under one deterministic pack/verify noun instead of becoming another orchestration layer.
prerequisites: Preserve schema names and the assemble/verify public contract.
